changeSet.author: Ritense
Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE audit_record SET audit_event = JSON_REMOVE( JSON_SET( audit_event, '$.definitionId.blueprintId', JSON_OBJECT( 'blueprintType', 'CASE', 'blueprintKey', JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.caseDefinitionId.key')), 'blueprintVersionTag', JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.caseDefinitionId.versionTag')) ) ), '$.definitionId.caseDefinitionId' ) WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.caseDefinitionId') IS NOT NULL;
